# Collapsible

A single collapsible section component for toggling the visibility of content. Simpler than Accordion when only one section is needed.

## Import

```jsx
import { Collapsible } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Collapsible` | Root container that manages the open/closed state |
| `Collapsible.Trigger` | Clickable element that toggles the content visibility |
| `Collapsible.Content` | Animated container that shows/hides content |

## Props

### Collapsible (Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `open` | `boolean` | - | Controlled open state |
| `defaultOpen` | `boolean` | `false` | Initial open state for uncontrolled usage |
| `onOpenChange` | `(details: { open: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback when the open state changes |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables the collapsible |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Collapsible>
  <Collapsible.Trigger>Toggle Details</Collapsible.Trigger>
  <Collapsible.Content>
    <p>Here are the hidden details that can be toggled.</p>
  </Collapsible.Content>
</Collapsible>
```

### Default open

```jsx
<Collapsible defaultOpen>
  <Collapsible.Trigger>Hide Details</Collapsible.Trigger>
  <Collapsible.Content>
    <p>This content is visible by default.</p>
  </Collapsible.Content>
</Collapsible>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

<Collapsible open={open} onOpenChange={(details) => setOpen(details.open)}>
  <Collapsible.Trigger>
    {open ? "Hide" : "Show"} Advanced Options
  </Collapsible.Trigger>
  <Collapsible.Content>
    <p>Advanced configuration options go here.</p>
  </Collapsible.Content>
</Collapsible>
```

### With custom trigger

```jsx
<Collapsible>
  <Collapsible.Trigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
      <LuChevronDown /> More Info
    </Button>
  </Collapsible.Trigger>
  <Collapsible.Content>
    <Box mt="2" p="4" borderWidth="1px" rounded="md">
      Additional information is displayed here.
    </Box>
  </Collapsible.Content>
</Collapsible>
```

## Features

- Simple show/hide toggle for a single content section
- Animated content expand/collapse transitions
- Supports controlled and uncontrolled usage
- Can be disabled to prevent toggling
- Trigger can be customized using the `asChild` pattern
- Forwards refs on all sub-components
- Lighter alternative to Accordion for single-section use cases
